arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest caught up in transfer drama – Claims of fake signature and a cover up
arts.sum: Former Besiktas technical director Samet Aybaba has claimed the deal to take Joe Worrall to the club from Nottingham Forest in January was done without his permission. Journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu provides comments from the 69-year-old today and explains something of a transfer scandal involving Nottingham Forest. arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest could target 'very fast' player in January, deal would be easy to do
How Liam Delap to Chelsea could ALTER the 2025 transfer market
arts.sum: Although Man Utd have scouted Delap on several occasions, Chelsea have linked with pursuing a deal for the 21-year-old for a little while longer and they could launch a formal offer in 2025. The England U21 international left Manchester City to join Ipswich on a permanent deal in July and he has scored six goals in 12 Premier League appearances since his €17.9 million move to Portman Road.
